stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
The annex shows a type of control panel with a number pad and its corresponding display which is found on board most aircraft. Considering only the digits 1140 themselves, they are the…

options.b: ATC mode A designation made of four digits 0 to 7.
options.c: ATC mode S call sign made of four digits 0 to 7.
options.d: ATC mode C designation made of four digits 0 to 7.
